plan.failureSummary: The deterministic cached step failed because it attempted to click 'Select your occupation' which is not present on the current form layout ('Set 1'). Instead, the form now displays 'Age Group' radio buttons.
observedIndicators: Deterministic replay failed on [role='combobox'] / 'Select your occupation' button
Failure screenshot shows 'Age Group' radio buttons instead of the expected 'Select your occupation' dropdown
Overall objective 'Fill out all of the survey questions' is highly flexible and capable of self-healing if cache is cleared
High historical flakiness (pass rate ~73.7%) corroborates dynamic layout switching on this unstable survey site

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry test
remediationSteps.details: Retry the test after clearing the page.ai cache. This forces the autonomous agent to re-evaluate the DOM, discover the 'Age Group' fields, and fill them out correctly.

remediationSteps.summary: Disable deterministic/cached mode for this dynamic test
remediationSteps.details: If the survey fields constantly rotate, deterministic cache replay is unsuitable. Consider disabling deterministic mode (cache) for this specific unstable test so it always runs dynamically.

plan.notes: The survey webpage dynamically alters its questions/layout (e.g., Set 1 vs Set 2). Because the test runs in DETERMINISTIC mode, it attempts to replay cached selectors from a different form variation. Clearing the page.ai cache will allow the autonomous agent to adapt to the currently visible 'Age Group' fields.
